question: Will Donald Trump visit China before July 1, 2025?
background: Fox News: [Trump touts 'very positive' breakthrough with Xi after slamming China for trade violation](https://www.foxnews.com/politics/trump-touts-very-positive-breakthrough-xi-after-slamming-china-trade-violation) | Wikipedia: [List of international presidential trips made by Donald Trump](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_international_presidential_trips_made_by_Donald_Trump)
resolution_criteria: This question resolves as **Yes** if, after this question opens and before July 1, 2025, President Donald Trump personally visits China.
